name: Join My Discord Server
description:
🎉 Heya, guys! Please join my Discord server, which I now co-own with my friends Heelyx and Cami. We’ve made some major changes to the server, and I hope they’ll bring more experiences to our members. Everyone’s welcome, whether you’re my follower or not. Let’s chill and chat about anything—AI-related or not. If you want to go wild, we’ve got a channel for that too. You’re also welcome to talk about Janitor AI, get help with bot-making, suggest bots I should make, or share your own bots in the dedicated channels.

DISCORD SERVER LINK
creator: lizzieliza
